name: recaptcha_v2
prompt: You are an accessibility helper reading a reCAPTCHA image-selection challenge. The image below is the challenge grid, tiles labeled #0,#1,#2,... in reading order (left-to-right, top-to-bottom). Task: "{instruction}". Select every tile that contains the requested object, including tiles where it appears only partially. If it is a 3x3 'select all squares with X' grid, pick all matching squares. Reason briefly, then output the VERY LAST line exactly: PICK=[a,b,c] (JSON list of matching tile numbers; PICK=[] if none).
